title: ngrok TLS Certificate
description: A TLS Certificate is an x509 certificate and private key pair used to terminate TLS traffic on ngrok endpoints.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TLS certificate.

uri.description: URI of the TLS certificate API resource.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the certificate was uploaded.

subject_common_name.description: The subject common name from the certificate.

subject_alternative_names.description: Subject alternative names from the certificate.

not_before.description: The certificate is not valid before this time.

not_after.description: The certificate is not valid after this time.

key_usages.description: Key usage extensions from the certificate.

extended_key_usages.description: Extended key usage extensions from the certificate.

private_key_type.description: The type of the private key (rsa, ecdsa, ed25519).
